MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD, ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY, FOR PETITIONER/MOVING PARTY, People of the State of California, (415)551-9544
NO OTHER APPEARANCES WERE MADE

Tentative ruling WAS adopted AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported. (610/BEC)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories granted. All objections except for attorney-client and attorney work product privilege are waived. Claimants shall serve full, complete and verified answers to Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories within ten days of the date of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
